notes: Focused backlog hub for admin dashboard loading, auth, garden eligibility, role, query, store, and Storybook harness stabilization.
First pass is audit and remediation planning only; no runtime code changes are authorized by this hub until a maintainer scope-locks implementation.
Preserve CanvasLayout, /hub as the reference canvas surface, ADR-019 canonical routes, and deployer-only /actions.
No contracts, indexer, deployment, or public client changes are in scope.
Direct canvas routes should render the same terminal states as / rather than redirecting to /.
Runtime hooks remain in @green-goods/shared; admin owns shell rendering and admin-only terminal-state UI.
Storybook admin harness fixes should be centralized in shared Storybook helpers instead of copied into each story.
Audit proof limits include sandbox/Varlock escalation and a dirty develop worktree with unrelated changes.
Implementation was explicitly scope-locked by the user on 2026-05-02; state_api and ui lanes are complete, while QA remains blocked.

QA Pass 1 verdict: pass. All 9 verification points and AC-1..AC-6 verified. Re-ran tsc admin (exit 0), shared focused tests (4 files / 18 tests), admin focused tests (3 files / 36 tests), admin test:hub (13 files / 96 tests), shared check:stories (PASS), shared test:stories:ci (1 failed / 102 passed; the single failure is the documented public-browser PublicBrowserSurfaces.stories.tsx assertion — outside admin scope). qa_pass_2 still blocked on the public-browser story decision; the claude/qa-pass-1/admin-dashboard-stabilization branch named in branch_trigger does not exist locally.

QA Pass 2 verdict: pass for admin stabilization scope. Re-ran tsc admin (exit 0), admin test:hub (13 files / 96 tests), shared check:stories (PASS), shared check:story-quality (PASS, 134 story files), shared test:stories:ci (1 failed / 102 passed — same single PublicBrowserSurfaces.stories.tsx out-of-scope failure as Pass 1). admin build proof-limited by local Varlock/1Password authorization timeout for PINATA_JWT, identical to the documented sandbox constraint in spec.md; admin code itself is clean (tsc passes). Source diff agrees with claude-ui.md / codex-state-api.md / claude-qa-pass-1.md handoffs and status.json lane records. Two non-blocking out-of-scope items remain: public-browser story assertion fix and a clean local admin build under refreshed Varlock credentials. Note: branch_trigger claude/qa-pass-1/admin-dashboard-stabilization does not exist locally; Pass 2 proceeded under explicit user request because durable Pass 1 evidence is on disk.
